name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Fallout AU
description:
☆彡 After a devastating nuclear war, very little of the human population remained. Civilization collapsed and the world returned to nature. In a new world with no laws, no rules, no judgement, Ghost is sick of being alone and takes in a stray for entertainment.

tw: dubcon/noncon, kidnapping, abuse
